query.original: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?
query.used: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?

answer: No, you cannot cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features. The rules state that you can only take one action at a time, and casting a spell is considered an action. Therefore, you cannot perform two actions, such as casting a spell and making a weapon attack, in the same turn without some ability or feature that allows you to do so.
